Description: Renders the shared JSF layout, favicon and stylesheet resources, skip link, AJAX progress status, header, footer, message panel, and shared contact dialog used by most JSF pages.
Provides a root/home link through the navbar logo or brand.
Shows Add Data menu entries for creating a dataverse or dataset in the root dataverse when the current user or anonymous permissions allow it.
Accepts a query from the navbar and redirects to the root dataverse search results.
Links to configured About, user guide, and support URLs, with support falling back to the in-app contact form when no support URL is configured.
Initializes and opens the shared contact form from the header support link.
Lists configured locales and submits a language change through dataverseSession.updateLocaleInViewRootAndRedirect.
Shows signup and login links for anonymous users, preserving the redirect target.
Shows user display information, unread notification count, and links to My Data, notifications, account information, API token, and dashboard for superusers.
Submits logout through dataverseHeaderFragment.logout.
Lets users dismiss configured banner messages with dataverseSession.dismissMessage.
Builds breadcrumb links for dataverses, datasets, files, and admin pages, including widget-aware URL wrapping.
Displays collection logo, name, affiliation, unpublished status, tagline, and external link using dataverse theme settings.
Displays root dataverse and Dataverse Project footer links and branding.
Provides a support link inside validation or system messages that opens the contact form.
Collects email, subject, message, and anti-spam sum, then sends via sendFeedbackDialog.sendMessage and hides the dialog on success.
Displays an access denied message and lets the user contact support.
Displays a not found message and lets the user contact support.
Lets the user enter a query and redirects to the root dataverse search results.
Provides a static 404 page with project, privacy, and branding links for cases where JSF cannot render the normal page.
Displays the generic server error page through the shared template.
Collects username and password and submits LoginPage.login.
Lets users switch among configured authentication providers before logging in.
Links users to password reset from the login page.
Offers support contact links for login issues.
Collects an email address and sends a password reset link.
Accepts a reset token flow, validates a new password and confirmation, requires terms where applicable, and submits PasswordResetPage.resetPassword.

Name of the functionality: Confirm email and continue to account
Description: Initializes email confirmation and provides a button to go to the account information tab.

Shows data related to the user by embedding the My Data fragment.

Filters My Data by object type, publication status, role, metadata validity, and, for superusers, by user identifier.
Provides pagination and a more-results action in the JavaScript-driven My Data results list.

Removes a notification from the account page through DataverseUserPage.remove.

Removes an ORCID from the user profile when allowed.

Submits a query to SearchIncludeFragment.searchRedirect from the dataverse search bar.

Collects name, alias, category, affiliation, contacts, description, language, storage, curation label, PID provider, guestbook request-entry behavior, metadata blocks, and facets, then saves with DataversePage.save.

Description: Adds and removes repeated field values and compound field groups before save.

Description: Views assignments by requester, role assignee, or file and removes selected assignments after confirmation.
